title: psychotria microglossa
intro: Psychotria microglossa, also known as "Kava-Kava" or "Hawaiian Kava" in some regions, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. The plant is native to tropical regions in the Pacific Islands, and it has been traditionally used for its medicinal and spiritual properties. The roots of the Psychotria microglossa plant contain compounds that have been found to have anti-inflammatory, anxiolytic, and antispasmodic properties, which can help to alleviate anxiety, insomnia, and muscle tension. Herbal preparations of Psychotria microglossa can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and it is often used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
